fileNodes.name: mod.rs
fileNodes.summary: BLE peripheral module providing platform abstraction and configuration for cross-platform BLE advertising. Defines PeripheralConfig for service/characteristic UUIDs and BlePeripheral trait with platform-specific implementations.

fileNodes.name: peripheral_linux.rs
fileNodes.summary: Linux BLE peripheral implementation using BlueZ via bluetooth crate. Provides async GATT server with RX characteristic for write requests and TX characteristic for notifications, running on a dedicated tokio runtime thread.

fileNodes.name: peripheral_macos.rs
fileNodes.summary: macOS BLE peripheral implementation using CoreBluetooth via objc2 framework. Provides GATT server with RX/TX characteristics, dispatch queue integration, and overflow-safe notification queuing.

fileNodes.name: peripheral_stub.rs
fileNodes.summary: Stub BLE peripheral implementation for unsupported platforms, returning errors for all operations. Used as fallback when platform-specific backend is not available.

fileNodes.name: peripheral_windows.rs
fileNodes.summary: Windows BLE peripheral implementation using Windows.Networking.Bluetooth namespace via windows-rs crate. Provides GATT server with RX/TX characteristics and handles write requests from centrals.

fileNodes.name: ble_central.rs
fileNodes.summary: BLE central role implementation for scanning and connecting to peripherals. Manages adapter, active peripheral connection, and notification stream using blesc crate for async BLE operations.

fileNodes.name: lib.rs
fileNodes.summary: Main native module implementing cross-device calculator sync with BLE transport, SQLite persistence, keychain identity, and JWS/JWE cryptographic signing. Entry point for napi-rs exports to JavaScript/TypeScript layer.

fileNodes.name: build.rs
fileNodes.summary: Rust build script that invokes napi-build to configure the napi-rs native module compilation.

fileNodes.name: browser-calculator.ts
fileNodes.summary: In-memory browser implementation of the calculator API for development/testing. Provides BLE session simulation, room management, peer discovery, and calculation submission without native dependencies.

fileNodes.name: log-store.ts
fileNodes.summary: Immutable log storage implementation using React's external store pattern. Provides a LogStore class with push, clear, toText methods and subscribe/getSnapshot for React integration via useSyncExternalStore.

fileNodes.name: logging-calculator-api.ts
fileNodes.summary: Logging middleware wrapper for calculator API calls. Wraps any calculator API implementation to log method invocations, results, timing, diagnostics, and errors to the log store for debugging.

fileNodes.name: main.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Main React renderer entry point implementing the calculator UI with BLE networking. Provides host/guest role selection, room discovery, peer connection management, calculation input with history, and a debug log console drawer.

fileNodes.name: index.html
fileNodes.summary: HTML entry point for the renderer process with strict CSP and a root div where React mounts.

fileNodes.name: styles.css
fileNodes.summary: Global stylesheet for the renderer UI defining layout, typography, and component styles.

fileNodes.name: expression.test.ts
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for the expression calculator utility. Validates arithmetic expression parsing and calculation correctness including basic operations and edge cases.

fileNodes.name: expression.ts
fileNodes.summary: Safe arithmetic expression evaluator supporting addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, and modulo operations. Parses infix expressions, validates input sanitization, and returns formatted decimal results.

fileNodes.name: main.ts
fileNodes.summary: Electron main process entry point that registers IPC handlers for calculator operations and creates the application window with sandbox configuration.

fileNodes.name: native-calculator.ts
fileNodes.summary: Loads the native Rust napi-rs BLE calculator module from multiple candidate paths with runtime type validation, falling back to a mock implementation for development environments.

fileNodes.name: preload.ts
fileNodes.summary: Electron preload script that exposes the calculator API to the renderer process via contextBridge, mapping all IPC channel invocations.

fileNodes.name: calculator-api.ts
fileNodes.summary: Shared TypeScript types and IPC channel names defining the calculator API contract between Electron main and renderer processes.

fileNodes.name: index.html
fileNodes.summary: HTML entry point for the Electron renderer process with strict Content Security Policy, mounting the React app root and loading the main renderer TypeScript module.

fileNodes.name: global.d.ts
fileNodes.summary: TypeScript global declaration that extends the Window interface with the calculator API exposed by the preload script.

fileNodes.name: .understandignore
fileNodes.summary: Configures the Understand-Anything knowledge graph tool by excluding generated artifacts, build outputs, and test files from analysis.

fileNodes.name: report.json
fileNodes.summary: Test artifact containing visual regression test results from the browser-based UI pass verification script.

fileNodes.name: eslint.config.mjs
fileNodes.summary: ESLint flat configuration enabling TypeScript, React Hooks rules, and consistent-type-imports enforcement across the codebase.

fileNodes.name: browser-visual-ui-pass.mjs
fileNodes.summary: Visual regression testing script that launches Chrome with CDP, captures screenshots, applies scenario scripts, and computes element overlap metrics.

fileNodes.name: build-mac-arm64.command
fileNodes.summary: Shell script that builds the native Rust module for macOS arm64 target using cargo, then restores the .node artifact to the project root.

fileNodes.name: build-native-optional.mjs
fileNodes.summary: Conditional native module build script that only runs cargo build if the .node artifact is missing, skipping build for prebuilt artifacts.

fileNodes.name: build-native.mjs
fileNodes.summary: Native module build script that invokes cargo with napi-rs to compile the Rust core into a Node.js addon.

fileNodes.name: next-version.mjs
fileNodes.summary: Version bumping utility that queries GitHub for the latest release tag and prints the next development version number.

fileNodes.name: package-platforms.mjs
fileNodes.summary: Cross-platform packaging orchestrator that builds native modules for multiple targets, runs electron-builder, and manages Rust toolchain installation per target.

fileNodes.name: release-all.bat
fileNodes.summary: Windows batch script that builds the native module, installs dependencies, and runs the cross-platform packaging script for all platforms.

fileNodes.name: release-all.command
fileNodes.summary: macOS command script that builds the native module, installs dependencies, and runs the cross-platform packaging script for all platforms.

fileNodes.name: visual-ui-pass.mjs
fileNodes.summary: Electron-based visual UI verification script that waits for the dev server, applies scenario scripts, and captures screenshots for regression testing.

fileNodes.name: visual-ui-screenshot-app.cjs
fileNodes.summary: Electron app launcher for visual testing that loads the renderer, executes scenario scripts via CDP, captures screenshots, and computes element overlap metrics.

fileNodes.name: electron-builder.yml
fileNodes.summary: Electron Builder configuration for packaging the Evolve Calc desktop app, defining app metadata, file inclusion patterns, asar unpack rules, and platform-specific targets (DMG for macOS, NSIS for Windows, AppImage/deb for Linux) with Bluetooth usage descriptions.

fileNodes.name: package.json
fileNodes.summary: NPM package configuration for the BLE Calculator Desktop app, defining dependencies (React, lucide-react), dev tooling (TypeScript, Vite, Vitest, Electron), and build scripts for development, native module compilation, testing, and cross-platform packaging.

fileNodes.name: tsconfig.json
fileNodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration with strict mode enabled, targeting ES2022 with NodeNext module resolution, React JSX transform, and indexed access safety for the Electron + React desktop application.

fileNodes.name: Cargo.toml
fileNodes.summary: Rust package configuration defining the napi-rs native module with platform-specific BLE dependencies (Core Bluetooth on macOS, WinRT on Windows, BlueZ on Linux).

fileNodes.name: vite.config.mts
fileNodes.summary: Vite configuration for the renderer dev server with React plugin, custom root, and strict port binding.

fileNodes.name: vitest.config.mts
fileNodes.summary: Vitest configuration defining test file patterns and excluding build artifacts from the test run.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Main project documentation covering the BLE Calculator Desktop Electron app architecture, commands, visual UI pass workflow, and native Rust module status with BLE sync capabilities.

fileNodes.name: evolve-calculator-theme.md
fileNodes.summary: Comprehensive UI theme specification extracting the Evolve brand identity (warm colors, condensed type, cream/charcoal palette) and applying it to a desktop calculator layout with detailed CSS tokens, component sketches, and interaction guidelines.

fileNodes.name: calculator-architecture.md
fileNodes.summary: Comprehensive architecture document covering the Electron+React+Rust calculator app, including runtime architecture, UI behavior, native module boundaries, BLE roles, security boundaries, end-to-end user flows, and planned development steps.

fileNodes.name: developer-onboarding.md
fileNodes.summary: Concise developer onboarding guide providing the shortest path for new developers to understand the calculator app, with read-first document pointers, main code paths, local development commands, validation steps, and common development tasks.

fileNodes.name: runtime-native-and-security.md
fileNodes.summary: Technical deep-dive on Electron security settings, IPC channels, native adapter loading, Rust scaffold, cross-platform BLE peripheral backends (macOS CoreBluetooth, Linux BlueZ, Windows GattServiceProvider), secure storage planning, and outstanding security work.

fileNodes.name: ui-layout-and-visual-pass.md
fileNodes.summary: UI layout documentation explaining the grid-based layout model, fixed calculator dimensions (420px x 620px), overflow rules, component responsibilities, browser mock for visual review, and automated screenshot testing via Chrome DevTools Protocol.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Documents the Rust napi-rs module scope, including current scaffold (mock BLE data) and planned native responsibilities (BLE flows, chunking, keychain, SQLite, cryptography).

fileNodes.name: release.yml
fileNodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds native installers for macOS, Linux, and Windows platforms in parallel and publishes GitHub releases on version tags.
